opening.truck: You noticed the oncoming truck a heartbeat too late.
A screech of tires, a flash of white — then silence.
Cold earth. Unfamiliar scents. This body... is not yours.
A voice whispers in the dark: "You are reborn. In this world the weak are prey. Only those who understand survive."
opening.prompt: What was the last thought to cross your dying mind?
intro.ch_forest: You open your eyes on a dim forest floor. Vast roots, damp air, danger in every shadow. To survive you must hunt — and this forest has a guardian.
outro.ch_forest: The guardian falls. A cold draft rises from deeper in the wood; greater things await ahead. But you are no longer as weak as you were.
ending: The story pauses here for now — new chapters are on the way. Keep surviving.
